differential_diagnoses: Occult malignancy (e.g., lymphoma or metastatic carcinoma)
next_steps: Measure quantitative serum immunoglobulins (IgG, IgA, IgM)
Perform dihydrorhodamine (DHR) flow cytometry assay for CGD
Evaluate specific antibody responses to protein and polysaccharide antigens (vaccine responses)
Perform whole-exome sequencing or targeted primary immunodeficiency gene panel
Re-evaluate liver biopsy pathology with focus on stains for Tropheryma whipplei
Perform PCR testing of liver biopsy tissue for fastidious organisms
